name: DIV
subtitle: Voltage Controlled Clock Divider & Multiplier
summary: Dual-channel voltage-controlled clock divider and multiplier in 2 HP. Each channel divides or multiplies an incoming clock by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, or 16, with a rate knob and CV input per channel. Two rhythmically independent outputs from a single clock.
